mapper.select: select t1.id,t1.sources,t1.create_time createTime, t1.amount ,t1.bank_code as bankCode,t1.bank_number as bankNumber,t1.user_bank_name as userBankName,t1.user_id userId,t1.`status` ,t1.partner_trade_no as partnerTradeNo,t1.send_amount sendAmount from app_wx_cash_out_record t1 where t1.`status`='1'

select t1.id,t1.source,t1.create_time createTime, t1.amount,t1.bank_code as bankCode,t1.bank_number as bankNumber,t1.user_bank_name as userBankName ,t1.user_id userId,t1.`status`,t2.err_code as errCode ,t2.partner_trade_no as partnerTradeNo,t1.send_amount sendAmount from app_wx_cash_out_record t1 left join app_wx_bank_interface t2 on t1.partner_trade_no=t2.partner_trade_no where t2.result_code!='SUCCESS' and t2.ops_flag=1 and t2.return_code='SUCCESS'
mapper.update: update app_wx_cash_out_record t1 set t1.status=#{status},t1.partner_trade_no=#{partnerTradeNo} where t1.id=#{id}
update app_wx_cash_out_record t1 set t1.status=#{status},t1.result_info=#{resultInfo},t1.result=#{result} where t1.id=#{id}
mapper.select:
select * from app_wx_cash_out_record t1
where t1.create_time<=DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 4 HOUR)
and t1.partner_trade_no is not null and t1.`status`='2' and (t1.result='DEFAULT' OR t1.result='PROCESSING' OR t1.result='SYSTEMERROR')
mapper.update: update app_wx_cash_out_record t1 set t1.result=#{result},t1.result_info=#{resultInfo},t1.success_time=#{successTime} where t1.id=#{id}
